title: Quick Guide - Translations
scenario: Quick Guide translations are incorrect or missing across supported languages in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Navigate to Account → Settings → Language and select a supported language.
3. Close and reopen the app, or trigger the Quick Guide (e.g., via Account → Help → Quick Guide or first-time setup flow).
4. Go through each screen/page of the Quick Guide and verify all text elements (headings, body text, button labels, tooltips) are translated into the selected language.
5. Note any text that appears untranslated (still in English), truncated, misaligned, or uses incorrect characters/encoding.
6. Repeat steps 2–5 for every supported language available in the app.
expected: All Quick Guide text is properly translated and displayed in the selected language, with no untranslated strings, truncation, or display issues.
